title: [FIRRTL] `FIRRTLLowering::visitDecl(MemOp op)`  has no tests
body: This code is doing a somewhat fiddly thing with memory modules - creating instances before the referenced module is created.  I need to refactor this code to make progress on parameterized module but the logic has no tests.  Can someone add a test or two so I don't break anything obvious?
